100% clear. Heavy surge at BM16 WL. Water column heavily aerated, no SRC applied. 50-70 cm standing waves/rolling waves at cway sect, highly turbulent. 100 lb weight too light for vel (>4m/s). Unable to get depth due to turbulence, captured surface velocities at standard chainage. Recalculated mmt in office based on WL depth increase at standard chainage, see field note. Sources:Manual
